overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city district. The character transitions from a busy street with holographic billboards to a tree-lined plaza, then approaches and enters a covered transit station beneath a massive circular holographic display structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with holographic advertising and vehicle traffic

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to yellow safety barriers, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive vertical holographic display showing 'BREATHTAKING' text and samurai imagery
bright yellow concrete barriers separating sidewalk from the road
tall buildings covered in glowing neon signs and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a bustling downtown sidewalk at dusk, with futuristic vehicles passing on the right and massive holographic billboards illuminating the scene. Yellow safety barriers line the edge of the road, and neon-lit buildings rise on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with mature trees and seating areas

events.description: turns left off the main street into a tree-lined plaza area

agents.ego_description: turning left from the sidewalk into an open plaza with large trees and benches

entered.detail: massive mature trees with thick trunks and dense canopies growing in the plaza
green and yellow concrete seating arranged along the walkway
small blue food vendor stall with illuminated menu displays

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a spacious urban plaza filled with large mature trees and concrete benches. The environment shifts from the busy street to a more open green space, with a blue food kiosk visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching a massive circular holographic structure

events.description: the massive circular holographic structure becomes prominently visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the large circular structure, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: massive circular building with a huge wraparound holographic screen displaying advertisements
tall building covered in bright rectangular neon advertisement panels

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open plaza, the character approaches a massive circular building with a huge holographic display wrapping around it. The plaza features scattered pedestrians, grass plots, and neon-lit buildings on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station entrance with stairs beneath the circular holographic structure

events.description: approaching the entrance beneath the circular structure, entering the covered area
ascending the stairs toward the station entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs toward the entrance beneath the circular holographic structure, passing pedestrians coming down

entered.detail: illuminated entrance to the transit station beneath the circular structure
concrete stairs leading up to the station entrance
bright purple vending machine with 'BURRITOS' signage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive circular structure and begins ascending stairs toward the station entrance beneath it. The environment becomes more enclosed, with a purple vending machine visible on the right and the holographic display now directly overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway beneath transit tracks with neon advertisements

events.description: entering the dark covered corridor illuminated by neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath the transit station, passing bright neon advertisements on the walls

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling of the covered walkway with structural beams
bright illuminated advertisement panels showing various products and characters
elevated monorail or train tracks running parallel to the walkway
green circular neon sign with 'OPEN' text

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark, enclosed commercial corridor beneath the transit tracks. The space is illuminated by bright neon advertisements and a green 'OPEN' sign, with elevated train tracks visible on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling neon-lit downtown street into a spacious urban plaza and finally into a dark, enclosed transit corridor. It begins on a crowded sidewalk at dusk, moving past futuristic vehicles and massive holographic billboards framed by yellow safety barriers. As the character turns left, the environment shifts from the dense city street to an open green plaza filled with mature trees, concrete benches, and a blue food kiosk. The scene then expands across the plaza toward a massive circular building wrapped in a holographic display, before the camera ascends stairs into a more enclosed space marked by a purple vending machine. Finally, the movement leads into a dark commercial corridor beneath elevated train tracks, where the lighting transitions to bright neon advertisements and a glowing green open sign.
